text: 🇺🇸 We know some MAGA cultists hate follow our channel and, given their well-known relationship with media literacy, we’ve included some random images of Jesus Christ along with equally random images of doctors so they have plenty of material to call us fake news with TDS. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 我们知道一些MAGA邪教徒喜欢关注我们的频道，考虑到他们众所周知的媒体素养，我们特意加入了一些耶稣基督的随机图片，以及同样随机的医生图片，这样他们就有足够的素材来指责我们散布带有TDS（特朗普精神错乱综合征）的假新闻了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters: Chinese officials warn that escalation between the United States and Iran around the Strait of Hormuz could destabilise global energy markets and the wider economy. Beijing says the situation is against international interests and urges restraint to avoid further disruption to global oil and gas flows. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：中国官员警告称，美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的升级局势可能会破坏全球能源市场和更广泛的经济。北京方面表示，这种情况违背国际利益，并敦促各方保持克制，以避免全球石油和天然气供应进一步中断。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. SOUTHCOM announces they struck an alleged drug smuggling boat in the eastern Pacific, killing two people: Applying total systemic friction on the cartels. On April 13, at the direction of #SOUTHCOM commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations. Intelligence confirmed the vessel was transiting along known narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific and was engaged in narco-trafficking operations. Two male narco-terrorists were killed during this action. No U.S. military forces were harmed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国南方司令部宣布，他们在东太平洋打击了一艘涉嫌走私毒品的船只，造成两人死亡：对贩毒集团施加全面的系统性摩擦。4月13日，在#南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万将军的指挥下，南方之矛联合特遣部队对一艘由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了致命的动力打击。情报证实，该船只正在东太平洋已知的毒品走私路线上航行，并参与了毒品走私活动。两名男性毒贩在行动中被击毙。美国军队没有人员伤亡。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Canadian Foreign Minister Anand released a statement mourning the death of a Canadian citizen who was killed in southern Lebanon amid Israel-Hezbollah strikes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 加拿大外交部长安南发表声明，对一名在以色列与真主党交火期间在黎巴嫩南部丧生的加拿大公民表示哀悼。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 JD Vance used a lot of words to essentially destroy whatever was left of his Catholic voter base. Mind you, this guy just released a book titled Communion: Finding My Way Back to Faith —a book that details his spiritual journey from atheism back to Christianity and his conversion to Catholicism. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 JD·万斯用了大量的辞藻，基本上摧毁了他天主教选民基础中仅存的一点东西。请注意，这家伙刚刚出版了一本书，书名为《共融：找回我的信仰之路》——这本书详细描述了他从无神论回归基督教并皈依天主教的精神旅程。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Professor Mohammad Marandi on Al Mayadeen: "Axios is not a reliable source, especially regarding the negotiations in Islamabad. What they reported is not accurate and not correct — and I can say that with confidence since I was there and was informed about the course of events." What happened in the Strait of Hormuz and the ongoing strikes in Lebanon are blatant violations of the ceasefire. These escalatory tactics will not succeed. On US blockade attempts: China stated its agreement with Iran is still in effect and oil tankers will continue passing through the Strait to Chinese ports. The US cannot implement this blockade completely because it will very significantly affect commercial routes in the Gulf of Oman — they'll be forced to pursue not only Iranian tankers but other ships too, which will be very dangerous for them and increase the cost of war. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 穆罕默德·马兰迪教授在广场电视台（Al Mayadeen）上表示：“Axios不是一个可靠的消息来源，特别是在伊斯兰堡谈判方面。他们的报道既不准确也不正确——我可以自信地说，因为我当时就在现场，并了解事件的进程。”霍尔木兹海峡发生的事情以及黎巴嫩正在进行的袭击是对停火协议的公然违反。这些升级策略不会成功。关于美国的封锁企图：中国声明其与伊朗的协议仍然有效，油轮将继续通过海峡前往中国港口。美国无法完全实施这种封锁，因为它将严重影响阿曼湾的商业航线——他们将被迫不仅针对伊朗油轮，还要针对其他船只，这对他们来说将非常危险，并会增加战争成本。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor So not only was Trump depicting himself as Jesus, he was mocking people’s faith in the process. “I think the president was posting a joke” — JD Vance on Trump’s tweet depicting himself as Jesus https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2043818741884989525/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：所以特朗普不仅把自己描绘成耶稣，还在这个过程中嘲弄了人们的信仰。“我认为总统是在发一个笑话”——JD·万斯在谈到特朗普把自己描绘成耶稣的推文时说 https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2043818741884989525/video/1 - 亚伦·鲁帕推文

text: WarMonitor Robert McElroy, Archbishop of Washington, says he hasn’t spoken to anyone who saw the image the way Trump claims, calling it disturbing for the president to take on the sacred identity of Jesus. “It crosses the line,” and most Christians should be very angry. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043824734635249872/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：华盛顿大主教罗伯特·麦克尔罗伊表示，他没有和任何以特朗普所声称的方式看待那张图片的人交谈过，称总统承担耶稣的神圣身份是令人不安的。“这越界了，”大多数基督徒应该感到非常愤怒。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043824734635249872/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 The Iraqi Federal Police Command says an individual behind the Telegram channel “Sabereen News,” which has over 1.2 million subscribers, is being prosecuted. The suspect is accused of attempting to blackmail an Iraqi lieutenant colonel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克联邦警察司令部表示，Telegram频道“Sabereen News”背后的一个人正在受到起诉，该频道拥有超过120万订阅者。嫌疑人被指控试图勒索一名伊拉克中校。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 According to JD Vance, Trump posted an AI-generated image of himself as Jesus “as a joke that a lot of people didn’t understand.” However, according to the Window Licker himself, it wasn’t a joke. According to him, it was meant to be him “as a doctor.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 据JD·万斯称，特朗普发布那张把自己描绘成耶稣的AI生成图片是“一个很多人没看懂的笑话”。然而，据“舔窗者”（Window Licker）本人所说，那并不是一个笑话。据他所说，那本意是让他看起来“像个医生”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Paypal to ban all Palestinian users, mandating an Israeli ID
text_zh: Paypal将封禁所有巴勒斯坦用户，强制要求提供以色列身份证

text: 🇺🇸 ☢️ 🇮🇷 According to The New York Times, the U.S. demanded a 20-year suspension of uranium enrichment, while Iran reportedly countered with a five-year proposal. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ☢️ 🇮🇷 据《纽约时报》报道，美国要求暂停铀浓缩20年，而据报道伊朗提出了五年的反建议。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. Vice President Vance called President Trump's post comparing himself to Jesus Christ a joke. "Well, first of all, Brett, I think the president was posting a joke and of course he took it down because he recognized that a lot of people weren't understanding…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 U.S. Vice President Vance told Pope Leo XIV to stay out of U.S. policy. "Well, look, I think the president has the prerogative to set American foreign policy. He's got the prerogative to set American immigration policy. He has to look out for the interests of The United States Of America, and that inevitably means that when the Vatican comments on issues of public policy, sometimes there's going to be agreement, of course, and sometimes there's going to be disagreement. I think that's a reasonable thing, Brett. Again, I don't think that it's particularly newsworthy but I certainly think that in some cases it would be best for the Vatican to stick to matters of morality, to stick to matters of, you know, what's going on in the Catholic church and let the president of The United States stick to dictating American public policy." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸美国副总统万斯称特朗普总统将自己比作耶稣基督的帖子是一个笑话。“嗯，首先，布雷特，我认为总统是在发一个笑话，当然他把它删除了，因为他意识到很多人并没有理解……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 美国副总统万斯告诉教皇利奥十四世不要干涉美国政策。“嗯，看，我认为总统有权制定美国外交政策。他有权制定美国移民政策。他必须照顾美利坚合众国的利益，这意味着当梵蒂冈评论公共政策问题时，有时会有共识，当然，有时会有分歧。我认为这是一件合理的事情，布雷特。再说一次，我不认为这特别值得报道，但我确实认为在某些情况下，梵蒂冈最好还是专注于道德问题，专注于，你知道，天主教会内部发生的事情，让美国总统专注于制定美国公共政策。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 US President Donald Trump on the posting of an image depicting himself as Jesus Christ “I thought it was me as a doctor”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在发布一张描绘自己为耶稣基督的图片时说：“我以为那是我作为一名医生”

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING: 🔴 U.S. Rep. Tony Gonzales (R-TX) said he will leave Congress after he admitted to having an affair with a staffer who later died by suicide. This comes less than a hour after U.S. Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA) resigned over sexual assault allegations. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043823253639016881/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯：🔴 美国众议员托尼·冈萨雷斯（共和党，德克萨斯州）表示他将离开国会，此前他承认与一名后来自杀的职员有染。这距离美国众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（民主党，加利福尼亚州）因性侵指控辞职不到一小时。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043823253639016881/photo/1 推文

Bush Operation off Southern Africa as Iranian Blockade Begins - USNI News https://news.usni.org/2026/04/13/carrier-uss-george-h-w-bush-operating-off-southern-africa-as-iranian-blockade-begins tweet

text: The Spectator Index US Vice President JD Vance says blockade will put economic pressure on Iran and the expectation is that Tehran will make progress towards opening the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043819144148390112/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：美国副总统JD·万斯表示，封锁将对伊朗施加经济压力，预期德黑兰将在开放霍尔木兹海峡方面取得进展。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043819144148390112/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JD Vance says the Iranian delegation in Pakistan lacked authority to finalize a deal and needed approval from higher leadership. “This is ultimately why we left Pakistan because what we figured out is that they were unable.” “I think the team that was there was unable to cut a deal and they had to go back to Tehran, either from the Supreme Leader or somebody else and actually get approval to the turn.” “So, again, whether we have further conversations, whether we ultimately get to a deal, I really think the ball is in the Iranian court because we put a lot on the table. We actually made very clear what our red lines were.” “We also made clear that we actually would be very happy. The President of the United States has said he would be very happy if Iran was treated like a normal country.” “The ball is in the Iranian court.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：JD·万斯表示，在巴基斯坦的伊朗代表团缺乏敲定协议的权力，需要更高层领导的批准。“这最终是我们离开巴基斯坦的原因，因为我们发现他们无法做主。”“我认为在那里的团队无法达成协议，他们必须回到德黑兰，无论是从最高领袖还是其他人那里，实际获得批准。”“所以，再说一次，无论我们是否进行进一步的对话，无论我们最终是否达成协议，我真的认为球在伊朗一边，因为我们摆出了很多筹码。我们实际上非常清楚地表明了我们的红线是什么。”“我们也明确表示，我们实际上会非常高兴。美国总统曾表示，如果伊朗被当作一个正常的国家对待，他会非常高兴。”“球在伊朗一边。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @ReutersIran : Exclusive: US, Iran leave door open to dialogue after tense Islamabad talks - https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/us-iran-leave-door-open-dialogue-after-tense-islamabad-talks-2026-04-13/ tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @ReutersIran：独家：美伊在紧张的伊斯兰堡会谈后为对话留出余地 - https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/us-iran-leave-door-open-dialogue-after-tense-islamabad-talks-2026-04-13/ 推文

text: Open Source Intel Vance on the Strait of Hormuz: Iran is expected to take steps toward reopening the waterway. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：万斯谈霍尔木兹海峡：预计伊朗将采取措施重新开放航道。推文

text: Open Source Intel NYT: In the Islamabad discussions, the U.S. pushed for a long term shutdown of Iran’s enrichment program, seeking a 20 year pause, while Iran proposed a far shorter 5 year window. Washington is also pressing for the removal of Iran’s enriched uranium stockpile, whereas Tehran is refusing to export it and is offering dilution as an alternative. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：NYT：在伊斯兰堡的讨论中，美国推动长期关闭伊朗的浓缩计划，寻求暂停20年，而伊朗提议了一个短得多的5年窗口。美国还在施压要求移除伊朗的浓缩铀库存，而德黑兰拒绝出口，并提议以稀释作为替代方案。推文

text: Open Source Intel VP Vance: "They basically threaten any ship that's moving through the Straits of Hormuz." "As the President showed, two can play at that game! If the Iranians are going to try to engage in economic terrorism, we're going to abide by a simple principle that no Iranian ships are getting out either." "We know that's a big deal to them. We know that applies additional economic leverage." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：副总统万斯：“他们基本上威胁任何通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只。”“正如总统所展示的那样，这种游戏两个人都能玩！如果伊朗人试图进行经济恐怖主义，我们将遵守一个简单的原则，即没有任何伊朗船只可以出去。”“我们知道这对他们来说是一件大事。我们知道这施加了额外的经济杠杆。”推文

text: Open Source Intel VP Vance: "I think it was the first time that you'd ever seen the Iranian government, the U.S. government meet at such a high level, maybe in the history of the current leadership of Iran. So that's, I think, a positive and again, we did make some progress in the negotiation” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043817182761566406/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：副总统万斯：“我认为这是你第一次看到伊朗政府和美国政府在如此高的层面上会面，也许在伊朗现任领导层的历史上是第一次。所以我认为这是一个积极的方面，再说一次，我们在谈判中确实取得了一些进展” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043817182761566406/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇭🇺U.S. Vice President Vance on Hungarian Prime Minister Orban's election loss: "Well, first of all, Brett, I think that Viktor Orban is a great guy who's done a very good job. I think that his legacy in Hungary is transformational. Sixteen years fundamentally…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President Vance called President Trump's post comparing himself to Jesus Christ a joke. "Well, first of all, Brett, I think the president was posting a joke and of course he took it down because he recognized that a lot of people weren't understanding his humor in that case. I think the president of The United States likes to mix it up on social media and I think that's one of the good things about this president is that he's not filtered. He doesn't send everything through a communications professional. He actually reaches out directly to the people." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇭🇺美国副总统万斯谈匈牙利总理欧尔班的选举失利：“嗯，首先，布雷特，我认为维克多·欧尔班是一个很棒的人，他做得非常好。我认为他在匈牙利的遗产是变革性的。十六年从根本上……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯称特朗普总统将自己比作耶稣基督的帖子是一个笑话。“嗯，首先，布雷特，我认为总统是在发一个笑话，当然他把它删除了，因为他意识到很多人并没有理解他在那种情况下的幽默感。我认为美利坚合众国总统喜欢在社交媒体上混搭，我认为这位总统的好处之一就是他没有经过过滤。他不会把所有东西都发给传播专业人士。他实际上是直接接触人民。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Vice President Vance on the second redline for the U.S. in negotiations with Iran: "And the second thing is that, again, to this point about verification, it's one thing for the Iranians to say that they're not gonna have a nuclear weapon. It's…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 U.S. Vice President Vance on Hungarian Prime Minister Orban's election loss: "Well, first of all, Brett, I think that Viktor Orban is a great guy who's done a very good job. I think that his legacy in Hungary is transformational. Sixteen years fundamentally changing that country, but one of the reasons we decided to do that, Brett, is not because you know we can't read polls. We certainly knew there was a very good chance that would lose that election. We did it because he's one of the few European leaders we've seen who's been willing to stand up to the bureaucracy in Brussels that has been very very bad for The United States." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国副总统万斯谈美国在与伊朗谈判中的第二条红线：“第二件事是，再说一次，关于核查这一点，伊朗人说他们不会拥有核武器是一回事。这是……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 美国副总统万斯谈匈牙利总理欧尔班的选举失利：“嗯，首先，布雷特，我认为维克多·欧尔班是一个很棒的人，他做得非常好。我认为他在匈牙利的遗产是变革性的。十六年从根本上改变了那个国家，但我们决定这样做的原因之一，布雷特，并不是因为你知道我们看不懂民调。我们当然知道很有可能在那次选举中失败。我们这样做是因为他是我们见过的少数几个愿意站出来反对布鲁塞尔官僚机构的欧洲领导人之一，这对美利坚合众国来说是非常非常糟糕的。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Vice President Vance on the first redline for the U.S. in negotiations with Iran: "And there are two things in particular where the president of the United States really said we have no flexibility. We have to get to the outcome that the president…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance on the second redline for the U.S. in negotiations with Iran: "And the second thing is that, again, to this point about verification, it's one thing for the Iranians to say that they're not gonna have a nuclear weapon. It's another thing for us to put in place the mechanism to ensure that's not gonna happen. Part of that is, of course, to ensure that they don't have the ability to enrich uranium, which is how they got so close to nuclear weapon before." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国副总统万斯谈美国在与伊朗谈判中的第一条红线：“有两件事特别值得一提，美国总统确实说我们没有灵活性。我们必须达到总统所说的结果……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯谈美国在与伊朗谈判中的第二条红线：“第二件事是，再说一次，关于核查这一点，伊朗人说他们不会拥有核武器是一回事。我们建立机制来确保这种情况不会发生是另一回事。其中一部分当然是确保他们没有能力浓缩铀，这就是他们之前如此接近核武器的方式。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Vice President Vance says that the big question for negotiations now is whether Iran will accept the U.S. redlines to move forward with a deal. "The big question from here on out is whether the Iranians will have enough flexibility, whether the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance on the first redline for the U.S. in negotiations with Iran: "And there are two things in particular where the president of the United States really said we have no flexibility. We have to get to the outcome that the president said. On the first of those things, what some people call the dust, which is the enriched uranium that the Iranians currently possess. We have said that we want that to come out of their country, and we would like to take possession of it. Now why does that matter? That doesn't matter, of course, because they have access to that material now. That access that that material is actually buried underground by operation midnight hammer. But if you think about this over the long haul, the president doesn't wanna leave the next president or the president after that to be worrying about this program. And so we would like to get that material out of the country completely so that The United States has control of it. That's number one." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国副总统万斯表示，现在谈判的大问题是伊朗是否会接受美国的红线以推进协议。“从现在开始的大问题是伊朗人是否有足够的灵活性，是否……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯谈美国在与伊朗谈判中的第一条红线：“有两件事特别值得一提，美国总统确实说我们没有灵活性。我们必须达到总统所说的结果。关于这些事情中的第一件，有些人称之为尘埃，也就是伊朗目前拥有的浓缩铀。我们已经说过，我们希望它离开他们的国家，我们希望获得它的所有权。现在这为什么重要？当然，这并不重要，因为他们现在可以使用这种材料。那种材料实际上被午夜锤行动埋在地下。但如果你从长远来看，总统不想把这个问题留给下一任总统或再下一任总统去担心。所以我们希望把这种材料完全从该国运出，以便美利坚合众国能够控制它。这是第一点。” @wfwitness

text: JD Vance: I think that, in some cases, it would be best for the Vatican to stick to matters of morality.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我认为，在某些情况下，梵蒂冈最好还是专注于道德问题。

text: قبل معركة القصير، وفي اللقاء الذي شاهدتموه في «أسرار التحرير»، قال السيّد استكمالًا لما عُرض: تكليفنا الانتصار في هذه المعركة، من جاء إلى هنا لشيء آخر ليرحل، لقد جئنا لننتصر فقط. في هذه الحرب الوجودية كما قال شيخنا المؤتمن، لا خيار آخر أمامنا سوى الانتصار، أن نقاتل حتى الشّهيد
text_zh: 在库赛尔战役之前，在你们在《解放的秘密》中看到的会面中，赛义德在展示的内容之后补充说：我们的任务是在这场战斗中取得胜利，任何来到这里为了其他目的的人都离开吧，我们来这里只是为了胜利。正如我们受托的谢赫所说，在这场生存战争中，我们别无选择，只能胜利，战斗直到成为烈士。

text: JD Vance on Trump posting himself as Jesus: I think Trump was posting a joke and, of course, he took it down because he recognized that a lot of people weren’t understanding his humor in that case.
text_zh: JD·万斯谈特朗普把自己描绘成耶稣：我认为特朗普是在发一个笑话，当然他把它删除了，因为他意识到很多人并没有理解他在那种情况下的幽默感。

text: JD Vance on the Iran talks: I wouldn’t just say things went wrong. I also think things went right. We made a lot of progress...
text_zh: JD·万斯谈伊朗会谈：我不会说事情进展得很糟糕。我也认为事情进展得很顺利。我们取得了很大进展……

text: It was an honest representation of the situation and saying that yes indeed we are harmed and help is appreciated by allies But also that this will not stop us and are willing to sacrifice everything until the last man to ensure that everyone will know in the future the righteous decision we took and until locals in south Lebanon can return back to their homes...to the LAST home on the border wall without any fear or under any threats. May God protect him so he can see this mission succeed. /59908?comment=219299
text_zh: 这是对局势的诚实陈述，说是的，我们确实受到了伤害，盟友的帮助受到赞赏，但这不会阻止我们，我们愿意牺牲一切直到最后一个人，以确保未来每个人都知道我们做出的正义决定，直到黎巴嫩南部的当地人能够回到他们的家中……回到边境墙上的最后一个家，没有任何恐惧或威胁。愿上帝保佑他，让他能看到这个任务成功。/59908?comment=219299

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. accomplished at the negotiations with Iran in Islamabad. "I wouldn't just say that things went wrong. I also think things went right. We made a lot of progress, but we also made very clear—and I think this…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance says that the big question for negotiations now is whether Iran will accept the U.S. redlines to move forward with a deal. "The big question from here on out is whether the Iranians will have enough flexibility, whether the Iranians will accept the critical things that we need to see in order for things to get done." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷美国副总统万斯谈美国在伊斯兰堡与伊朗的谈判中取得了什么成就。“我不会说事情进展得很糟糕。我也认为事情进展得很顺利。我们取得了很大进展，但我们也说得很清楚——我认为这……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯表示，现在谈判的大问题是伊朗是否会接受美国的红线以推进协议。“从现在开始的大问题是伊朗人是否有足够的灵活性，伊朗人是否会接受我们需要看到的关键事项，以便事情能够完成。” @wfwitness

text: JD Vance: I am sure we will work very well with the next prime minister of Hungary.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我相信我们将与下一任匈牙利总理很好地合作。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. accomplished at the negotiations with Iran in Islamabad. "I wouldn't just say that things went wrong. I also think things went right. We made a lot of progress, but we also made very clear—and I think this is part of the progress we made—what terms the United States could make some accommodation on, what terms we were flexible on, and what things we absolutely needed to see in order for the president of the United States to feel like he was getting a good deal. And so we laid those things out. We had some good conversation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯谈美国在伊斯兰堡与伊朗的谈判中取得了什么成就。“我不会说事情进展得很糟糕。我也认为事情进展得很顺利。我们取得了很大进展，但我们也说得很清楚——我认为这是我们取得进展的一部分——美国可以在哪些条款上做出一些妥协，我们在哪些条款上是灵活的，以及为了让美国总统觉得他达成了一项好协议，我们绝对需要看到哪些事情。所以我们列出了这些事情。我们进行了一些很好的对话。” @wfwitness

text: JD Vance: We didn’t go to Hungary because we expected Viktor Orbán to cruise to an election victory; we went because we thought it was the right thing to do.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我们去匈牙利不是因为我们预期维克多·欧尔班会轻松赢得选举；我们去是因为我们认为这是正确的事情。

text: U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright on Iran: Trump knew going into this that if you disrupt the flow of energy through the Strait of Hormuz in the short term, you’re going to push up energy prices.
text_zh: 美国能源部长克里斯·赖特谈伊朗：特朗普在进入这一点时就知道，如果你在短期内扰乱通过霍尔木兹海峡的能源流动，你就会推高能源价格。

text: JD Vance claims: Trump wants the Iranian people to thrive and succeed.
text_zh: JD·万斯声称：特朗普希望伊朗人民繁荣昌盛。

text: JD Vance on the Iran talks: I wouldn’t just say things went wrong. I also think things went right. We made a lot of progress...
text_zh: JD·万斯谈伊朗会谈：我不会说事情进展得很糟糕。我也认为事情进展得很顺利。我们取得了很大进展……

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Martyr concludes his life with a final prayer, passing the blessings attained with his fighting hands 🤲🏼 to his face that will glow and shine upon the world of the hereafter. As the Quran informs us … إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ لَفِی نَعِیمٍ﴿ ٢٢ ﴾ ‎ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَاۤىِٕكِ یَنظُرُونَ﴿ ٢٣ ﴾ ‎ تَعۡرِفُ فِی وُجُوهِهِمۡ نَضۡرَةَ ٱلنَّعِیمِ﴿ ٢٤ ﴾ Surely the virtuous will be in bliss {22} ˹seated˺ on ˹canopied˺ couches, gazing around {23} You will recognize on their faces the glow of delight {24} Quran: Al-Muṭaffifīn 83, Ayah 22-24
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党烈士以最后的祈祷结束了他的生命，将他战斗的双手所获得的祝福🤲🏼传递给他那将在来世世界中发光发亮的脸庞。正如古兰经告诉我们的…… إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ لَفِی نَعِیمٍ﴿ ٢٢ ﴾ ‎ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَاۤىِٕكِ یَنظُرُونَ﴿ ٢٣ ﴾ ‎ تَعۡرِفُ فِی وُجُوهِهِمۡ نَضۡرَةَ ٱلنَّعِیمِ﴿ ٢٤ ﴾ 义士们必在恩泽中 {22} 在宝座上观看 {23} 你从他们的脸上，可以认出恩泽的光辉 {24} 古兰经：Al-Muṭaffifīn 83, 第22-24节

text: WarMonitor Scaramucci says even the AI seemed to dunk on Trump, placing what looked like a “young Epstein” in the image and describing him as “fatigued.” On the war, he says Trump has no strategy, went in with no exit plan, and that if Congress had a backbone, it’d be calling people in. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043814872773702041/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：斯卡拉穆奇说，连AI似乎都在嘲弄特朗普，在图片中放置了一个看起来像“年轻的爱泼斯坦”的人，并将其描述为“疲惫的”。关于战争，他说特朗普没有战略，进入时没有退出计划，如果国会有骨气，它就会传唤相关人员。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043814872773702041/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Eric Swalwell resigns from Congress. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043809997612515764/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯——埃里克·斯沃韦尔从国会辞职。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043809997612515764/photo/1 推文

text: At Islamabad talks, the US demanded Iran halt uranium enrichment for 20 years; Iran offered up to five. The US also wants enriched uranium removed, while Iran insists on keeping it but diluting it. Source: NYT
text_zh: 在伊斯兰堡会谈中，美国要求伊朗停止铀浓缩20年；伊朗提议最多五年。美国还希望移除浓缩铀，而伊朗坚持保留但提议稀释。来源：NYT

text: The US and Iran are discussing another round of face-to-face talks to secure a longer-term ceasefire after recent negotiations in Islamabad, led by JD Vance, ended without a deal. Officials hope to meet again before the current two-week ceasefire expires next week, possibly in Islamabad or another location. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 美国和伊朗正在讨论进行新一轮面对面会谈，以确保在由JD·万斯领导的伊斯兰堡近期谈判无果而终后，达成更长期的停火。官员们希望在下周目前的为期两周的停火到期前再次会面，可能在伊斯兰堡或其他地点。来源：彭博社

text: Hillary Clinton: Israel itself has lived in a very dangerous neighborhood for a very long time. It deserves our support separate and apart from Netanyahu.
text_zh: 希拉里·克林顿：以色列本身在一个非常危险的社区生活了很长时间。它理应得到我们的支持，这与内塔尼亚胡无关。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇧🇷 ICE arrested former Brazilian Intelligence chief Alexandre Ramagem for illegally being in the U.S. after fleeing Brazil following his conviction of plotting a coup with former Brazilian President Bolsonaro. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇧🇷 美国移民和海关执法局（ICE）逮捕了前巴西情报局长亚历山大·拉马根，原因是他因与前巴西总统博索纳罗策划政变被定罪后逃离巴西，非法滞留美国。@wfwitness

text: Hillary Clinton: I do support Israel. I am a staunch supporter of Israel. And I am a staunch opponent of Netanyahu. He has stayed too long. He has, in my view, undermined Israel’s long-term security.
text_zh: 希拉里·克林顿：我确实支持以色列。我是以色列的坚定支持者。我也是内塔尼亚胡的坚定反对者。他待得太久了。在我看来，他破坏了以色列的长期安全。

text: Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-Calif.) said he will resign from Congress amid sexual assault and misconduct allegations and growing bipartisan pressure to step down.
text_zh: 众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（民主党，加利福尼亚州）表示，在性侵和不当行为指控以及两党要求其下台的压力日益增加的情况下，他将从国会辞职。
